name: Trump Headquarters
subject: FW: About the tax code..
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Can I get your opinion on this? |
---
| | | Peter,

We're getting ready to send responses to the President and his team to help craft this critical tax reform legislation, but we noticed you haven't completed the survey yet.

---
**THE PRESIDENT 'S 2017 TAX REFORM SURVEY** **Account Name:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=88ca97ba89ed79c6f4b86caa2fc19870d3cc34015750e72c3293662fcf052a159593419bfa23d5e7ffd5326386e55b3b)** **2017 President 's Tax Reform Survey Response:** **PENDING****Deadline: 11:59 PM TONIGHT** [ **TAKE THE SURVEY NOW**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=88ca97ba89ed79c68fadf0abd441c91af3aad41f30443ea38d0be0b83ce3bd7f34628988ced43764f807a2dc8555c00e)
---
**[Please take the President's 2017 Tax Reform by 11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=88ca97ba89ed79c6e758a22e57e19d935ffea2043648d8ac0447660c389736548ea28b1799b5caa4f7c1fb7c873a6c94)**

Thanks,

Team TRUMP

****
---
| **\---------- Forwarded Message ----------**
From: Donald J. Trump
Date: September 12, 2017
Subject: About the tax code..
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=88ca97ba89ed79c6e7543393bd2a57b938e30a5ed5a24d6634863e9b6b5a53c3d5abc2ac3de88048aceecaffdfdc3bfc)**
---

Peter,

It's time to simplify the tax code. By doing so, we will boost consumer spending, encourage savings and investment, and _maximize_ American economic growth.

So it's important we get it done right.

That's why, as a hardworking American, I'd like to know what you think.

**[Please take a moment to share your input on our country's financial future by taking my Official Tax Reform Survey today.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=88ca97ba89ed79c697eb377b5f1cff39b01e0624ee11615c96e9db57b47a7ecf1044d2f9f2a68308a069bc8ad68c2f90)**

We're getting to work on one of the country's biggest issues, Peter, and I'd really appreciate your thoughts.

Together, we will...
* Provide tax relief for middle-class Americans.
* Simplify the code and reduce filing complications.
* GROW THE AMERICAN ECONOMY!

**[So please, take just 5 minutes and fill out my Official Tax Reform Survey today.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=88ca97ba89ed79c6e2de2c9a60aa8c9a7e028e0f2c08c6c817178579c5dec7119c2f7cf5631f32913484b40c0f688deb)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=88ca97ba89ed79c642f0c7aaae2beb0f1ac78920dc1841f4bd168bae11e4f35ab00b4e3d3afe5453c785c125bf7d33c4)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States [SHARE YOUR INPUT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=88ca97ba89ed79c6d450dc25b880dc6361ec58f654162d3c9c104f0088a77ede5761a930b7115a789ea4095822648549)
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=88ca97ba89ed79c61b2c0188b803c8be4603fd547f50d12512ea4b88fa49e4b27859e28995eea715d641ebf30c511720) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=88ca97ba89ed79c61661191a3aca1a3da57c0b83622f4f556d9e38ab5f1af77e1a50ee3988fa2d6ba6c9badb66de855a) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab15754b4945b2c96fa322269266d20b3d6559a048647fa229e20cf5f7d98f40bc5fe4655ab75d1473) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d4846c542e20e462578211c916b1cef25ba0a7b4cd99558f7b639)
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: your chance to meet Barack Obama (enter now!)
body:
Enter for the chance to meet Barack Obama later this month. **You and a friend could meet President Obama in Washington, D.C. Pitch in $3 or more before midnight tonight, and you'll be automatically entered for the chance to win!
**[ENTER NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1e9/21065075/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd")**
**
[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1f6/21065075/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1f7/21065075/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1f4/21065075/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1f5/21065075/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1f2/21065075/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1f3/21065075/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1f0/21065075/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd")
**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1f1/21065075/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd")

[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1ff/21065075/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd")

[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1fa/21065075/VEsHAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd")
**

|
---|---

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 9/17/17. Enter by contributing **[here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1fb/21065075/VEsHAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd")** , or click **[here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1f8/21065075/VEsHAw/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-signup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd")** to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, DC; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; the opportunity for winner and winner's guest to attend a DNC event on 9/27/17 (approximate retail value of all prizes $3,000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to **[Official Rules](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c1f9/21065075/VEsHAg/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd")** and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c186/21065075/VEsHDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c187/21065075/VEsHDA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=19+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c184/21065075/VEsEBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523593/4067b0a/382837683/7e60c185/21065075/VEsEBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=21+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Democrats.org
subject: Want to meet President Obama? Enter before midnight!
body:
Enter for the chance to meet Barack Obama later this month.
---
**You and a friend could meet President Obama in Washington, D.C. Pitch in $3 or more before midnight tonight, and you'll be automatically entered for the chance to win!
**[ENTER NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c658/1873745279/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")**
**
Derek --

President Obama is joining us in Washington, D.C. for a big event later this month -- and if you pitch in now, you'll be automatically entered for the chance to meet him there!

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c666/1873745279/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c664/1873745279/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c665/1873745279/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c663/1873745279/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c661/1873745279/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c66f/1873745279/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")
** My team -- the DNC's Operations Team -- takes care of the logistics for these sorts of events. So take it from me: this is an extremely hot ticket.

I can't say I'm surprised. President Obama is back to help us get America on track, and Democrats are fired up to hear from him.

**[You can be there in the thick of the action.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c66d/1873745279/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+You+can+be+there+in+the+thick+of+the+act&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")** We'll cover your flights, hotel stay, and tickets to hear from President Obama here in Washington, D.C. You can even bring a friend along to meet him.

**But you have to enter to win -- so pitch in $3 or more to be automatically entered today:

** **[ ENTER NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c66a/1873745279/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+ENTER+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")
** Best of luck!

Becca

Becca Sharp
Director of Operations
Democratic National Committee

|

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 9/17/17. Enter by contributing **[here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c66b/1873745279/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")** , or click **[here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c669/1873745279/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-signup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")** to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, DC; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; the opportunity for winner and winner's guest to attend a DNC event on 9/27/17 (approximate retail value of all prizes $3,000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to **[Official Rules](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c677/1873745279/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd")** and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c674/1873745279/VEsHBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c672/1873745279/VEsHAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c673/1873745279/VEsHAA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235af/4067b0a/3818bf8c3/7e60c671/1873745279/VEsHAw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_bs_nd&source=em_20170917_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170917_bs_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Peter Hanscom, Donnelly for Indiana
subject: why this matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Every deadline from now until Election Day matters |
---

| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2472/7377f838/3405648b/51fbf15b/2406771407/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sep17mm?refcode=20170917nd&amount=10")
---
Peter,

There's a reason we keep telling you what election forecasters like _Cook Political Report_ and _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ are saying about Joe's race.

Since it began predicting elections, _Cook_ has been right on over 97% of the races it's called. And _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ is widely regarded as the most accurate election predictor in the country. So when they call our race a "toss-up," we have to listen because you bet the other side will be. **And they 'll spend everything they have to defeat Joe.**

**That 's why every deadline from now until Election Day matters. We're announcing a 300 donor mid-month goal to help combat the multi-million-dollar GOP onslaught.**

**Can you chip in to help us hit our 300 donor mid-month goal so we can turn this "toss up" into a win?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2472/7377f838/3405648b/51fbf15a/2406771407/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sep17mm?express_lane=true&refcode=20170917nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2472/7377f838/3405648b/51fbf155/2406771407/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sep17mm?express_lane=true&refcode=20170917nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2472/7377f838/3405648b/51fbf154/2406771407/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sep17mm?express_lane=true&refcode=20170917nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2472/7377f838/3405648b/51fbf157/2406771407/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sep17mm?express_lane=true&refcode=20170917nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2472/7377f838/3405648b/51fbf156/2406771407/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sep17mm?express_lane=true&refcode=20170917nd")**
Peter, there's a reason dark money groups have named Indiana a top target -- they think being ranked a "toss-up" shows that this seat will be an easy win for the GOP. **We need to show them it won 't be.**

**[Will you pitch in $5 towards our 300 donor mid-month goal so that we can continue to build a campaign that can win this election?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2472/7377f838/3405648b/51fbf15b/2406771407/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sep17mm?refcode=20170917nd&amount=10")**

Thank you,

Peter Hanscom
Campaign Manager

****[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2472/7377f838/3405648b/51fbf151/2406771407/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sep17mm?refcode=20170917nd&amount=25")****
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2472/7377f838/3405648b/51fbf150/2406771407/VEsP/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Democrats.org
subject: 🔵 Derek, want to meet Barack in D.C.? 🔵
body:
Enter for the chance to meet Barack Obama later this month. **You and a friend could meet President Obama in Washington, D.C. Pitch in $3 or more before midnight tonight, and you'll be automatically entered for the chance to win!
**[ENTER NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf4c/602374944/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd")**
**
[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf4d/602374944/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd")
**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf4a/602374944/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf4b/602374944/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf48/602374944/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf49/602374944/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf56/602374944/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf57/602374944/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd")
**

|
---|---

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 9/17/17. Enter by contributing **[here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf54/602374944/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd")** , or click **[here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf55/602374944/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-signup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd")** to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, DC; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; the opportunity for winner and winner's guest to attend a DNC event on 9/27/17 (approximate retail value of all prizes $3,000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to **[Official Rules](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf52/602374944/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd")** and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf53/602374944/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf50/602374944/VEsHBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf51/602374944/VEsHAQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405235a3/4067b0a/3804a5c70/7e60cf5e/602374944/VEsHAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170917_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170917_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|
